title: SessionParameters
description: Session parameters that should be set before executing the statement.

timezone.description: Time zone to use when executing the statement.

query_tag.description: Query tag that you want to associate with the SQL statement.

multi_statement_count.description: Number of statements to execute when using multi-statement capability. 0 implies variable number of statements. Negative numbers are not allowed.

client_result_chunk_size.description: Maximum size of each set (chunk) of query results to download.

rows_per_resultset.description: Maximum number of rows returned in a result set.

use_cached_result.description: Whether to use a previously-cached result set for a query whose result set is still in the cache.
